project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with TypeScript, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL
build_system: npm with Next.js build, drizzle-kit for schema/migrations
test_framework: Vitest for unit/integration, Playwright for E2E
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run build` to verify TypeScript compiles. 2. Run `npm test` to run vitest suite.
setup_instructions: npm install, then npm run build to verify
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js 22 available.
contribution_requirements: Strict TypeScript. Every API route uses requireAuth + isSuperAdmin check. Tables use utils.pk(), utils.lifecycle(). Schemas export from drizzle/schema/index.ts. New pages need loading.tsx/error.tsx. Use zod for validation.

key_patterns.api_auth_pattern: const ctx = await requireAuth(request); if (ctx instanceof NextResponse) return ctx; if (!ctx.isSuperAdmin) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Forbidden' }, { status: 403 });
key_patterns.schema_pattern: pgTable with utils.pk(), utils.lifecycle(), utils.tenantId() for tenant-scoped, plus index helpers
key_patterns.module_gate: lib/modules/gate.ts has requireModule() and requireFeature() that check forceEnabled (super admin override) before checking plan access
key_patterns.sidebar_nav: components/superadmin/sidebar.tsx SECTIONS array defines nav items
key_patterns.email_service: lib/email/service.ts exports sendEmail() that uses Resend API or SMTP
key_patterns.existing_users_api: app/api/superadmin/users/route.ts already lists users with memberships but limited fields
key_patterns.existing_modules_api: app/api/superadmin/modules/ and /tenants/[id]/modules/ handle module force-enable per tenant

directory_structure: app/ = Next.js App Router (api/, superadmin/, tenant/, portal/), lib/ = core logic, drizzle/schema/ = DB tables, components/ = UI, tests/ = vitest/playwright
